channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Here’s how Google is using LLMs for complex internal code migrations
item.description: Code migration is a critical process in maintaining software applications. It helps improve performance and resilience, keeps systems up to date, and removes stale or irrelevant code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Biden won't enforce TikTok ban: Reports
item.description: Reports allege that President Biden will not enforce the TikTok ban slated to take effect on Sunday, just one day before the presidential inauguration, according to multiple reports, including by the Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Surprise finding sheds light on what causes Huntington's disease, a devastating fatal brain disorder
item.description: Scientists are unraveling the mystery of what triggers Huntington’s disease, a devastating hereditary disorder that strikes in the prime of life.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Snowflake open sources SwiftKV to reduce inference workload costs
item.description: Cloud-based data warehouse company Snowflake has open-sourced a new proprietary approach — SwiftKV — designed to reduce the cost of inference workloads for enterprises running generative AI-based applications. SwiftKV was launched in December.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: TikTok CEO to Attend Trump Inauguration Amid Looming Ban
item.description: TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew will attend President-elect Trump's inauguration Monday, one day after a potential ban of the video sharing platform could take effect in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Untangling the legacy and modern system conundrum
item.description: One of the most common challenges we hear is that organizations believe connecting their legacy and modern systems is nearly impossible. Well, that’s not true.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden cyber EO seeks proof of security from software vendors
item.description: The new cybersecurity executive order seeks to put teeth behind the secure software development standards that federal vendors are supposed to be following. The post Biden cyber EO seeks proof of security from software vendors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: It’s time for Apple to press pause on its AI news summaries
item.description: Apple should shut off its AI summaries of news alerts until it can prevent them from spreading fake news. Anecdotes of iPhone users seeing weirdly phrased summaries of texts and other content are common. But getting news headlines wrong is another matter.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: 5 things to know about TikTok replacement RedNote
item.description: Earlier this week, the Chinese app Xiaohongshu, known as RedNote, shot up to become the most-downloaded app on the Apple’s U.S. App Store, partly as a “joke’s on you” moment to the American government as well as the desire for a replacement app ahead of the incoming TikTok ban.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Trump will 'find a way' to preserve TikTok, Waltz says
item.description: President-elect Trump will take action to preserve TikTok upon taking office, his incoming national security adviser said Wednesday, with a deadline looming for the app’s owner to sell or face a ban in the United States. Rep. Mike Waltz (R-Fla.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Stanford AI expert’s credibility shattered by fake, AI-created sources: judge
item.description: Hancock, a prolific, high-profile researcher whose work has received some $20 million in grant support over the past two decades, charged $600 an hour to prepare the testimony the judge tossed.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Fox will stream next month's Super Bowl for free on Tubi
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fox will stream the Super Bowl on Tubi for the first time, giving streamers and cord cutters a chance to watch the big game on Feb. 9 for free. Tubi was acquired by Fox Corporation in 2020. It is a free, ad-supported streaming service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The femosphere is the internet’s toxic women-focused answer to the manosphere
item.description: “Men should always do the chasing, women should seek financial contributions from men.” No, this is not dating advice from the 20th century—it’s appearing in online spaces like TikTok and Youtube, part of what researchers are now naming the femosphere.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Congressman Ro Khanna calls for ‘full and transparent’ investigation into death of OpenAI whistleblower Suchir Balaji
item.description: The request came weeks after the whistleblower's family began publicly questioning a preliminary determination that the 26-year-old Suchir Balaji died of suicide.
item.dc:creator: Jakob Rodgers, The Mercury News

item.title: Biden's big semiconductor law will ramp up US chip production -- but at a high cost, report finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A sweeping 2022 law, touted by President Joe Biden as a way to revive U.S. manufacturing of semiconductors and reduce the country’s reliance on foreign-made computer chips, will “sharply increase production’’ of semiconductors in the United States.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI health tech will transform your fitness routine
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: These top online AI courses can help advance your career
item.description: Demand for generative AI (genAI) courses is surging, passing all other tech skills courses and spanning fields from data science to cybersecurity, project management, and marketing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg will cohost reception with Republican billionaires for Trump inauguration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is cohosting a reception with billionaire Republican donors next week for Donald Trump’s inauguration, the latest sign of the Facebook founder's embrace of the president-elect.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US TikTok users flock to Chinese app Xiaohongshu in protest with TikTok ban looming
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — As the threat of a TikTok ban looms, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: First 15 things to do or try first when you get a new iPhone
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson: If you just bought a new iPhone, here’s what to do first when you fire it up.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Polish town invites Musk to buy castle for his European HQ
item.description: Tech billionaire is reportedly looking for a sizeable location, possibly a castle in Italy, as a hub for his operations in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Shape-shifting AI Transformer homes will leave you wanting one
item.description: AC Future and Pininfarina unveil AI Transformer homes, merging sustainability and innovation. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this could change the way we think about home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Hidden Dangers of Unchecked Cloud Growth: Why Cost Management Matters
item.description: The cloud's agility and scalability can quickly become a financial sinkhole without proper management. Enterprises are finally waking up to the importance of diligent cloud cost management.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Britain's leader unveils AI strategy, including vow to rip up red tape hindering AI projects
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The British government pledged on Monday to rip up the red tape hindering construction of data centers that underpin artificial intelligence while promoting its “pro-innovation” approach to regulating the technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CISA aims to help cyber, tech pros find their path
item.description: CISA’s National Initiative for Cybersecurity Careers and Studies helps cyber pros keep up with technology changes ranging from AI to zero trust. The post CISA aims to help cyber, tech pros find their path first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
